title: The Wife of Seishu Hanaoka
actors: Raizô Ichikawa, Ayako Wakao, Hideko Takamine
plot: The Wife of Seishû Hanaoka is set in feudal Japan. Its two central characters are based on the wife and mother of Japanese physician Seishû Hanaoka (1760-1835). Hanaoka developed a herbal general anesthetic, "Tsusensan", some fort...
